name: community contribution validator requires a contributor identity field on every entry
command: mkdir -p community/sources && printf 'id: x\nsource_class: financial-industry\n' > community/sources/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/community/validate.sh" --entry community/sources/x.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*contributor' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
